video_concept: Generate a 30-second video of two people saying goodbye at a train station. Focus on the emotions during their last moments together, with a slow-motion close-up of one person as the train leaves. Use soft, natural lighting and a slight colour desaturation to convey melancholy. Settings: Make it photorealistic and details oriented All shots should be only 5 seconds long No Narration Only Background Music Use only ai generated videos
